languages.text: "Полковник, проявите уважение. Перед вами мой великий предок и человек, который когда-то спас ваш полк".
"Colonel, show some respect. You stand before my great ancestor, the man who once saved your regiment."
languages.original_text: "Полковник, проявите уважение. Перед вами мой великий предок и человек, который когда-то спас ваш полк".

traits.locale_text: "Colonel, show some respect. You stand before my great ancestor, the man who once saved your regiment."
"Colonel, show some respect. You stand before my great ancestor, the man who once saved your regiment."
"Colonel, show some respect. You stand before my great ancestor, the man who once saved your regiment."
"Colonel, show some respect. You stand before my great ancestor, the man who once saved your regiment."

languages.text: "Colonel, zeigt etwas Respekt. Ihr steht vor meinem ehrwürdigen Ahnherrn, dem Mann, der einst Euer Regiment gerettet hat."
languages.original_text: "Colonel, show some respect. You stand before my great ancestor, the man who once saved your regiment."

traits.locale_text: "Colonel, zeigt etwas Respekt. Ihr steht vor meinem ehrwürdigen Ahnherrn, dem Mann, der einst Euer Regiment gerettet hat."

languages.text: « Colonel, un peu de respect. Vous êtes face à mon ancêtre, l'homme ayant sauvé votre régiment en son temps. »
languages.original_text: "Colonel, show some respect. You stand before my great ancestor, the man who once saved your regiment."

traits.locale_text: « Colonel, un peu de respect. Vous êtes face à mon ancêtre, l'homme ayant sauvé votre régiment en son temps. »

languages.text: «Coronel, un poco de respeto. Está ante mi gran antepasado, el hombre que salvó su regimiento hace mucho».
languages.original_text: "Colonel, show some respect. You stand before my great ancestor, the man who once saved your regiment."

traits.locale_text: «Coronel, un poco de respeto. Está ante mi gran antepasado, el hombre que salvó su regimiento hace mucho».

languages.text: "Albay, biraz saygı göster. Alayını kurtaran adamın, yüce atamın huzurunda duruyorsun."
languages.original_text: "Colonel, show some respect. You stand before my great ancestor, the man who once saved your regiment."

traits.locale_text: "Albay, biraz saygı göster. Alayını kurtaran adamın, yüce atamın huzurunda duruyorsun."

languages.text: “上校，放尊重点。站在你面前的是我的伟大先祖，他曾经救过你们军团。”
languages.original_text: "Colonel, show some respect. You stand before my great ancestor, the man who once saved your regiment."

traits.locale_text: “上校，放尊重点。站在你面前的是我的伟大先祖，他曾经救过你们军团。”

languages.text: 「大佐、敬意を払ってください。あなたは私の偉大な祖先、かつてあなたの連隊を救った男の前に立っています」
languages.original_text: "Colonel, show some respect. You stand before my great ancestor, the man who once saved your regiment."

traits.locale_text: 「大佐、敬意を払ってください。あなたは私の偉大な祖先、かつてあなたの連隊を救った男の前に立っています」
